settings.ggTrK8dhGZY_text:
After age 40, your body produces about 50% less nitric oxide—the molecule that naturally signals blood vessels to relax and allow blood flow. 

 

This decline affects circulation throughout your body, not just during intimate moments. 

 

Your cardiovascular system, brain, muscles, and sexual function all depend on efficient blood flow.

 

Prescription medications work by blocking an enzyme (PDE5) that causes blood vessels to constrict. 

 

They force temporary dilation for a few hours. It's effective symptom management, but it doesn't restore the natural nitric oxide production that declined with age.
settings.gge4R23ohfE_text:
The side effects you're experiencing occur because medications force system-wide blood vessel dilation indiscriminately. 

 

Headaches happen because blood vessels in your brain dilate. 

 

Nasal congestion, flushed face—all consequences of forcing a system-wide response when targeted, natural blood flow is what your body needs.

settings.ggPyLxkwKF5_text:
Men who've added foundational blood flow support to their existing protocols report something specific: they feel healthier overall, not just in moments of intimacy. 

 

Energy improves. Recovery from workouts gets faster. Mental clarity increases. 

 

They're addressing the root cause, declining circulation, not just managing one symptom.

 

Berkeley Life's Nitric Oxide Support provides concentrated plant-based nitrates, the equivalent of 7 ounces of beetroot in two capsules. 

 

These nitrates convert to nitric oxide in your body, supporting the same natural mechanism that declined after 40.

 

In 90-day clinical trials, Berkeley Life demonstrated 28% increase in blood flow with clinically proven 24-hour support. 

 

This isn't forcing temporary dilation—it's supporting your body's natural signaling system continuously.
settings.ggUrBRkis50_text:
Week 1-2: Many men notice improved morning readiness—a sign that natural blood flow is responding to nitric oxide support.

 

Week 4-6: Overall vascular health improving. Energy more sustained throughout the day. Recovery from exercise faster.

 

Week 8-12: Foundation established. Working alongside existing treatments to support overall cardiovascular health and vitality.

 

Ongoing: Continuous support for the biological system that naturally declined with age.

 

Berkeley Life includes patented saliva test strips so you can measure your nitric oxide levels objectively. 

 

Test before starting (most men over 40 test low), then retest at weeks 4, 8, and 12. 

 

Watch levels improve as your foundational blood flow health strengthens.
